code: export const LEGACY_PORTAL_URL=process.env.REACT_APP_LEGACY_PORTAL_URL||'https://student-insight-hub-alpha.vercel.app/';export const isAdminLikeRole=role=>['admin','faculty'].includes(role);export const isExternalRoute=route=>/^https?:\/\//i.test(route||'');export const getDefaultRoute=user=>isAdminLikeRole(user===null||user===void 0?void 0:user.role)?'/admin':LEGACY_PORTAL_URL;export const redirectToRoute=function(route,navigate){let options=arguments.length>2&&arguments[2]!==undefined?arguments[2]:{replace:true};if(isExternalRoute(route)){window.location.replace(route);return;}navigate(route,options);};export const getRoleLabel=role=>{switch(role){case'admin':return'Admin';case'faculty':return'Faculty';default:return'User';}};
